name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run this command...
2. Use this code...
3. See error...

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Code Example**
```
// Paste a minimal code example that reproduces the issue
```
**Environment**
- Torvik version: `rune version`
- OS info
- Compiler/LLVM/Clang version (if relevant)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, logs, etc.).

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have provided a minimal reproducible example.

> [!WARNING] 
> Please make sure you are not submitting already existing issues. Known issues will be handled with the priority-level deemed necessary by the team.
